Petition For Order Authorizing Trustee To Continue Rebuild Of Trust Property And To Obtain A Loan Secured By The Trust Property To Finance The Rebuild
Off Calendar Nov-23-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Sheila Robello.
Richard Bryan for Residual Beneficiaries Jeanette Lau and Crystal Chow. Jeanette Lau also present via Zoom.
Brian Trowbridge for architect, Alex Korn.

The Court noted there is no waiver of notice from Brian Chow. Ms. Robello stated that Brian Chow received proper notice filed August 26th and served again for Sept 29th, that a letter was sent out approximately 2 weeks ago with today's hearing date, that she has reached out to all beneficiaries, that attempts have been made by other beneficiaries for Brian Chow's waiver, that Brian Chow has a history of not responding to this matter, and that his set amount of $70,000.00 is not affected by his waiving notice. The Court noted that it cannot go forward without proper notice or waiver of notice from Brian Chow. Ms. Robello stated she continued to work off-line with proposed beneficiaries on the partial settlement with the architect to take the pending litigation set for January off calendar and she is actively trying to settle this matter. Mr. Bryan stated that he shares the same views with Ms. Robello in regard to getting the settlement with the architect and they are working quite well together. Ms. Robello further stated that Brian Chow received notice of the underlying petition which protects his rights, that Brian Chow received adequate notice to resolve this matter today and expressed her concern that a continuance would require discovery to move forward with arbitration and reduce funds from the trust. Mr. Trowbridge stated approval is in the best interest of this case. The Court noted the hearing date was advanced with the understanding that everyone would waive notice. Each Counsel spoke of agreement to just settle with the architect, that counsel met and conferred, and that the agreement preserves the claim against the trustee.

The Petition for order authorizing trustee to continue rebuild of trust property and to obtain a loan secured by the trust property to finance the rebuild is continued to January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Third report and account of trustee is continued to January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Petition for instructions approving partial settlement agreement and mutual release, etc. is taken under submission.
